title: BYOK Speech App: 56-Provider API Research Report (March 2026)

sections.title: Part 1: The nine core BYOK providers
sections.markdown: These are the direct API integrations the app must support. They receive the most detailed treatment.

sections.title: Part 3: Chinese providers
sections.markdown:
### 16. Zhipu AI / Z.AI (China) — LLM ✓ TTS ✗ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. International platform at Z.AI.

`glm-5` ($1.00/$3.20, MIT license), `glm-4.7` ($0.60/$2.20), `glm-4.7-flash` (**FREE**), `glm-4.5-flash` (**FREE**). STT: `glm-asr-2512` ($0.03/MTok). ⚠️ No dedicated TTS API found internationally. OpenAI-compatible (`https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4/`).

sections.title: Critical findings and integration guidance
sections.markdown:
### Three providers have shut down or pivoted since mid-2025

**PlayHT** (acquired by Meta, services terminated December 31, 2025), **Lepton AI** (acquired by NVIDIA, now a GPU marketplace), and **Aleph Alpha** (pivoted to enterprise-only sovereign AI). Additionally, **Baichuan** pivoted to healthcare and **01.AI/Yi** stopped pre-training. All five should be excluded from active BYOK integration.

### API compatibility determines integration cost

The vast majority of providers now support the **OpenAI-compatible API format**, making them near-drop-in replacements. Notable exceptions requiring custom integration:

- **Anthropic** — Messages API (different request/response format)
- **Cohere** — Chat API v2 (own format, native RAG)
- **IBM watsonx** — Proprietary IBM REST API
- **Baidu ERNIE** — Proprietary Qianfan API
- **Google Cloud Speech/TTS** — gRPC/REST with Google-specific auth (though Gemini LLM supports OpenAI-compatible mode)
- **Azure Speech** — Speech SDK + REST (though Azure OpenAI LLMs use OpenAI-compatible format)
- **ElevenLabs, Deepgram, AssemblyAI** — Each has unique REST/WebSocket APIs
- **NVIDIA Riva** — gRPC + WebSocket (own protocol)

### GDPR-optimal provider selection

For EU compliance, the strongest providers are **Mistral AI** (French HQ, EU data processing by default), **Gladia** (French, SOC 2 Type 2), and **Speechmatics** (UK, on-prem option). Google Vertex AI, Azure, and AWS all offer EU data residency. **DeepSeek** and most Chinese providers have **no GDPR adequacy** — data processed in mainland China under Chinese law.

### Best free tiers for BYOK default provider

**Groq** stands out with no-credit-card free access, ultra-fast Whisper STT, and multiple free LLM models. **xAI** offers up to $175/month free. **Deepgram** provides $200 free credit (no expiry). **Google AI Studio** offers generous free Gemini access. **Cerebras** has a completely free inference tier.

### Recommended minimum viable integration set

For the nine core providers, the app should prioritize:

- **LLM:** OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq (free default), Mistral, Cohere, DeepSeek, xAI, NVIDIA — all confirmed active with clear model IDs
- **TTS:** OpenAI `gpt-4o-mini-tts`, Google Cloud TTS / Gemini TTS, xAI TTS (5 voices, WebSocket), NVIDIA Riva Magpie
- **STT:** OpenAI `gpt-4o-mini-transcribe`, Google Chirp 3, Groq `whisper-large-v3-turbo` (free default)

For speech-specialized needs beyond the core nine, **ElevenLabs** (best TTS quality, 70+ languages), **Deepgram** (best STT value with $200 free credit), and **Cartesia** (fastest latency at 40ms) are the strongest additions.

---

*All pricing, model IDs, and availability data verified against provider documentation and third-party sources as of March 23, 2026. Prices are subject to change. Model IDs with date suffixes (e.g., `-2026-03-05`) pin to specific snapshots; aliases without dates auto-update to latest versions.*
